rows.command/env: focr: /private/tmp/cc_tgt_dev/release/focr ocr tests/fixtures/onechart/sample_chart.png --model /Volumes/USBNVME16TB/temp_agent_space/zoo/onechart/onechart.int8.focrq --task chart-data --max-length 4096 [threads=8 FOCR_TIMING=1]; ref: scripts/gauntlet_reference.py --stage all --page tests/fixtures/onechart/sample_chart.png --model-dir /Volumes/USBNVME16TB/temp_agent_space/zoo/onechart --backend hf --precision f32 --entry gauntlet_ref_zoo:run_onechart --setup gauntlet_ref_zoo:setup_onechart --pin-torch 2.12.1 --pin-transformers 4.45.2 --threads 8 --runs 3 --warmup 1 --out artifacts/perf/bd-3jo6.1.11/onechart/ref_stages.json [torch==2.12.1 transformers==4.45.2]
rows.correctness_proof: OneChart D6 + bd-2lje certs: number head cos 1.0 maxabs 2.4e-7; 6-chart corpus head fires 6/6 mean dist 0.015 int8 / 0.014 f32; decoded text BYTE-IDENTICAL f32-vs-int8 on all 6 corpus charts (src/native_engine/onechart.rs)
rows.notes: A11 zoo lane; ref = pinned upstream chat(reliable_check=True) f32 CPU (cert stack torch 2.12.1/transformers 4.45.2 via --pin-*); token counts differ (focr 257 vs ref 179 — OOD garble trajectories, DISC-003 class), decode-per-token normalizes; focr e2e = process wall INCL 346MB artifact load, ref e2e excludes load (bias favors ref)
